extortion.description: [AI generated] Stila Cosmetics is an American cosmetics brand established by celebrity makeup artist Jeanine Lobell in 1994. Known for its modern, sophisticated and professional quality makeup products, the company offers a broad range of cosmetics including lipsticks, eyeshadows, foundation, and skincare products. Stila's sustainable beauty vision encompasses creating stylish, innovative and artistry-proven items while maintaining environmental responsibility.
